author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for LSP service + LSPTool (server pool, diagnostics, passive feedback) — read CC LSPServerManager.ts (~420), LSPServerInstance.ts (~511), LSPDiagnosticRegistry.ts (~386). Not addressable in this cleanup session: external-source research. Phase 2 implementations tracked under #636 (server pool), #638 (diagnostic registry), #640 (passive feedback), #643 (LocationLink), #644 (gitignore filter), #645 (5 missing ops), #651 (workspace/configuration reverse-request). Owner-level external research.
